essence: Installs windows and glazed systems, ensuring weatherproofing, security, and thermal performance.

identity.title: Window Installer
identity.summary: Measures, fits, and seals windows and frames in residential and commercial buildings to specification.

salary.notes: Specialist installers for curtain walling or heritage glazing can earn more.

qualifications: Experience in glazing and window installation
Ability to read installation drawings and levels
Knowledge of sealing, flashing, and thermal performance
Working at height and manual handling awareness

lifestyle.description: Site work with physical tasks and customer interaction; often project‑based with travel between sites.

habits: Measures and prepares openings for windows
Maintains tools and ensures site cleanliness
